limitations: Post-hoc manual ClickHouse console verification on 2026-04-21 showed address_transfer_legs contains 283854684 rows, not 3511111540. The earlier closure bundle incorrectly reused the watcher-derived synthetic field clickhouse_legs = count(events) * 2 from scripts/ops/22_watch_pipeline_eta.py instead of querying address_transfer_legs directly.

Frankfurt loader-host i-0835e4602efaacf59 was intentionally shut down after the bounded run completed. A fresh post-shutdown re-probe could not be executed on 2026-04-21 because StartInstances returned AWS account status Blocked.

Extractor SQLite runs.status remained stale as running even though run.json and extraction.json were already at uploaded. The run manifest, upload checkpoint, segment_upload_state, and S3 object count were treated as the authoritative source-side truth.

The exact skipped-row sum behind the source-to-canonical delta was not recomputed after shutdown, but the final loader ledger did show 487 skipped segments and 3681 validated segments, which is operationally consistent with the observed delta.
The S3 raw payload has already been deleted. A leg rebuild now depends on the preserved local raw archive on Singapore plus the retained S3 manifests, checksums, and extraction checkpoint.
